x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Create release notes based on closed GitHub issues and publish GitHub releases.

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: repository-dir
options.description: The root directory of the git repository

options.name: header
options.description: An optional header of the release notes

options.name: format
options.description: The output format of the release notes

options.name: output-file
options.description: The output file path. If not specified, the release notes are written to STDOUT

options.name: output-mode
options.description: Whether output-file should be overwritten, appended or prepended to

options.name: output-encoding
options.description: The encoding to use when writing release notes to a file

options.name: github-token
options.description: The token used for GitHub API authentication

options.name: git-tag-regex
options.description: A regex to use when looking for the git tag representing the previous release. If not specified, the most recent tag is considered as the previous release

options.name: configuration-file
options.description: The release notes configuration file to use. If not specified, the repository root directory and current directory are searched to find one

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: name
options.description: An optional name of the release

options.name: tag-name
options.description: The tag name of the release

options.name: target-commitish
options.description: A commitish value to specify the target of the tag. Defaults to the repository's default branch. Unused if the tag already exists

options.name: body
options.description: A file containing the body of the release (usually a markdown file)

options.name: prerelease
options.description: Whether or not the release is a pre-release

options.name: draft
options.description: Whether or not the release is in draft state. To publish the release use '--draft false'

options.name: assets
options.description: A collection of assets to include in the release

options.name: github-token
options.description: The token used for GitHub API authentication

options.name: repository-owner
options.description: The name of the GitHub organization or user owning the target repository

options.name: repository-name
options.description: The name of the target repository

options.name: repository-dir
options.description: The root directory of the git repository. Alternative of --repository-owner and --repository-name. Determines target repository owner and name by the remotes of the local git repository

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: id
options.description: Get release by ID

options.name: tag-name
options.description: Get release by tag name

options.name: all
options.description: Gets all releases

options.description: The root directory of the git repository. Alternative of --repository-owner and --repository-name. Determines target repository owner and name by the remotes of the local git repository

options.name: verbose
options.description: Enable verbose output

options.name: help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: id
options.description: The ID of the release to update

options.name: tag-name
options.description: The current tag of the release. Can be used instead of '--id' to identify the release to update. Requires the tag to exist in the GitHub repository

options.name: name
options.description: The new name of the release

options.name: new-tag-name
options.description: The new tag name of the release

options.name: target-commitish
options.description: The new commitish value to specify the target of the tag. Defaults to the repository's default branch. Unused if the tag already exists

options.name: body
options.description: A file containing the new body of the release

options.name: prerelease
options.description: Whether or not the release is a pre-release

options.name: draft
options.description: Whether or not the release is in draft state. To publish the release use '--draft false'

options.name: assets
options.description: A collection of assets to include in the updated release

options.name: clear-assets
options.description: Whether or not to delete all the existing assets

options.name: overwrite-assets
options.description: Whether or not to overwrite assets that match the name of assets in this update. Only has an effect if this update has any assets and '--clear-assets' is not specified. To disable overwriting of assets, use '--overwrite-assets false'

options.description: The token used for GitHub API authentication

options.description: The name of the GitHub organization or user owning the target repository

options.description: The name of the target repository

options.description: The root directory of the git repository. Alternative of --repository-owner and --repository-name. Determines target repository owner and name by the remotes of the local git repository
